filter_logic: name-based INCLUDE gate AND NOT EXCLUDE gate at scrape time; barcode dedup + nutrition-sufficiency at BSIP1 curation. Identical two-stage pattern to run_yogurt_003.

overlap_guard.vs_snack_bars: EXCLUDE 'חטיף'/'bar'/'בר ' removes granola/cereal BARS (snack_bars scope). Boxed/bagged granola eaten with milk stays IN — verified by absence of bar tokens. This is the explicit no-overlap rule from TASK-140.
overlap_guard.vs_dairy_yogurt: EXCLUDE 'יוגורט'/'חלב'/'משקה' removes yogurt-with-cereal-topping crossover products that route to dairy.
overlap_guard.granola_handling: Granola is NOT excluded from the corpus — it is INCLUDED, then assigned to a distinct granola SUB-POOL inside the category at BSIP1 per Constitution Art. II Rule 5 (cereals_gap_resolution_v1 Sec 2.9 / Resolution 3). Pool separation, not corpus exclusion.

min_corpus_rationale: cereals_gap_resolution_v1 launch condition 1: BSIP0 corpus must contain >=30 editorial-scope products traceable to a real Israeli retailer.
no_overlap_with_active_categories: PASS — filter rules disjoint from yogurt/maadanim/snack_bars/bread active filters.
